text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: As I am now, I am unfit to bear the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A Mejiro who learns nothing from defeat?
Inconceivable...
choice_data_list: Are you going to lose to yourself, too?
Are you going to lose to yourself, too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A Mejiro who learns nothing from defeat?
Inconceivable...
choice_data_list: Are you going to lose to yourself, too?
Are you going to lose to yourself, too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
choice_data_list: You only really lose if you give up.
You only really lose if you give up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. How very like you to say that, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am she—Mejiro Bright. An Umamusume of
the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I shall seize victory, and that is final.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It offends me. No matter my adversary, I'll not
taste defeat again.
choice_data_list: What are you going to do, then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...I'm going to run. I shall run, and I shall win my
next race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family!
